task: Session 3: typed credential catalog (n8n-inspired) + auto-MCP per integration + npm publication + event triggers

phases.name: Wheel-Scout
phases.notes: User pasted n8n analysis (the wheel scout's job done by the user)

events.message: Session 3: 5 agents across 2 waves; user contributed n8n architectural analysis as scout substitute

decisions.decision: Adopt n8n's typed credential catalog pattern
decisions.rationale: User's n8n analysis showed it's the IP — well-defined schema per integration so engine knows how to authenticate. We have AES + OAuth refresh; missing the typed catalog.

decisions.decision: Wave 1 = analysis + npm (independent), Wave 2 = 3 implementers reading Wave 1 design
decisions.rationale: compare-mike's design doc declares manifest fields that credentials-oscar implements and mcp-papa consumes — sequential dependency

decisions.decision: Auto-MCP scope: per-integration generated server, not per-deployment
decisions.rationale: Each installed integration becomes an MCP server exposing its operations. Skills+CLI fallback per ROADMAP §1.
